chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-931 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No. 4961/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 3. For orders on M.A.No. 4962/2025 (E/A). 4. For hearing of main case. ------ 10.09.2025 Mr. Riaz Hussain Mirani, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. ------ 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. Since the petitioner was removed from service by Sindh Police Department on certain charges; however, he filed Service Appeal before the Sindh Service Tribunal, which by way of Judgment dated 06.06.2016 was allowed and he was directed to be reinstated into service. Learned counsel submits that right from the passing of Judgment, the petitioner has knocked the doors from pillar to post; however, has not been accommodated; hence maintained this petition. Seemingly by way of this petition, the petitioner has sought implementation/execution of the Judgment dated 06.06.2016, passed by Sindh Service Tribunal, which in our view is not tenable, therefore, this petition being meritless is dismissed in limine. However, the petitioner is at liberty to file proper appeal/representation before the Sindh Service Tribunal for execution/implementation of the said judgment strictly in accordance with law. Learned Additional Advocate General, present in the Court in connection with some other matters, waives notice of instant petition and does not oppose the proposal so advanced. Petition stands disposed of the above terms alongwith listed applications. Judge Judge Manzoor
